# Documentation Instructions

## Primary Guidance

- Follow `docs/documentation-standards.md`.
- Keep `AGENTS.md` short and factual.
- Put durable detail in `docs/`.

## Rules

- Update docs in the same change when commands, configuration, contracts, structure, deployment flow, or workflow rules change.
- For meaningful changes to `AGENTS.md`, harness docs, routing docs, `.github/*`, or `skills/*/SKILL.md`, also run `docs/harness-evaluation.md`.
- Repair or remove stale references instead of layering new explanation over outdated text.
- Promote stable corrections into `docs/troubleshooting.md`, `docs/agent-feedback-log.md`, or the nearest durable doc.
